rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §33.209 governs UIL incorporation of safety regulations into contest rules; it is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The University Interscholastic League shall incorporate the provisions of Sections 33.203-33.207 into the league's constitution and contest rules.
_note: Rule text concerns UIL safety regulations; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
